title: Participant
description: Human or AI entity. Field names here match the actual ParticipantAdded/ParticipantDeclared runtime payloads (src/events.js createParticipant, src/cli.js participantDeclare, src/validator.js validateParticipantAdded/validateParticipantDeclared), not the older snake_case shape (display_name/type/organization/identity_ref/...) this file previously described. Two creation paths exist at runtime: ParticipantAdded (auto-added when a participant first acts in a thread, carrying only id/object/kind/name/role) and ParticipantDeclared (an explicit `participant declare`, additionally carrying declaredBy/declaredAt). Only the fields common to both are required here. See the schemas/v0-vs-runtime sync item before treating any sibling file in this directory as ground truth.
